name: base-files
title: base-files
description:
Debian base system miscellaneous files
This package contains the basic filesystem hierarchy of a Debian system, and
several important miscellaneous files, such as /etc/debian_version,
/etc/host.conf, /etc/issue, /etc/motd, /etc/profile, and others,
and the text of several common licenses in use on Debian systems.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use base-files because Debian base system miscellaneous files.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use base-files as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair base-files with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `base-files --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
